SEARCH
Package repository

Class Database

java.lang.Object
repository.Database
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Database extends Object implements Serializable
Central persistence and in-memory storage component for the university system.

The class exposes shared collections used by role services and serializes them into the data directory. It also provides a singleton access point for the storage layer, matching the project architecture requirement for a single data source.

See Also:

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static Database getInstance()
      Returns the single database instance.
      Returns:
      shared Database instance

    • save

      public static void save()
      Serializes all persistent collections to disk.

      The method is called after menu operations that mutate application state, such as registration approval, mark entry, user management, attendance updates, journal subscription, and news creation.

    • load

      public static void load()
      Loads persistent collections from disk.

      If a file is missing, the corresponding collection is initialized with an empty default value. Corrupted serialized files are reset by read(String, Object).

    • getCourses

      public static Vector<Course> getCourses()
